title: Legacy-WoW.com - Vanilla Addons
description: Lightweight WoW addons for low-end systems. Questie Lite, Titan Panel Classic, Atlas maps. Perfect for G4 performance.
author: Altivec
content:
Addons for Vanilla WoW on G4

Legacy-WoW.com hosts classic addons that work perfectly on lower-end hardware.

Recommended Addons

  • Questie Lite - lightweight quest helper
  • Titan Panel Classic - minimal performance impact
  • Atlas - dungeon maps without lag
